race.description: Dale & Hitchcock Country Boosted Maiden Plate
race.comment: WILL THE THINKER (6) raced forward and placed second over 1200m at Nowra on debut, beaten 2.3L on a heavy track. Will be better for that, and this is easier. Boudvillain is a positive jockey engagement, and the longer sprint shouldn't be an issue. INITIATE (9) is a big threat. Was nudged out three starts back at Goulburn and then again at the Sapphire Coast 8 days ago over 1205m. Led in that and has the inside gate today, back in grade. Keeps Owen and will get every chance to manage the step up in trip. PASSING THROUGH (10) peaks, and the local should be ready to show more like his best Victorian form. Has a low gate and races forward. Has to be considered. EXTREMELY EXCITING (8) has been ordinary in her last two off awkward barriers. Placed here the one prior and draws handy today. Might be the one to include at a price.
